system.Text:
__When you have at least one active campaign clock that threatens a vow (formidable or greater) and you spend extended time in a place safe enough to recuperate, profit, and develop your legacy__, determine the amount of time you are committing to the hiatus. Then, as appropriate to that time, set the rank of the profit progress track and a number of segments for the downtime's tension clock.

* Half a season: Dangerous rank / four segments
* A full season: Formidable rank / eight segments

When the downtime tension clock is full, you must @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.BZ1aRPB41ebQ9Z77]{Depart To Quest}

Trigger.Text: When you have at least one active campaign clock that threatens a vow (formidable or greater) and you spend extended time in a place safe enough to recuperate, profit, and develop your legacy
